turns.user_message: I tried to make myself feel better by cleaning the whole house, but it just feels emptier now. I guess that didn't really work.
I keep trying these little things to shake this feeling, and they never seem to last. It's like I'm just going through the motions for nobody.
I'm starting to think nothing I do will ever fill this quiet space. The silence just feels permanent now.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This has been going on for a while.
